title: carex setigera
intro: Carex setigera, also known as the hairy-fruited sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Carex setigera include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
